channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 120,877 → 128,159 (+7,282)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 128,159 | Forks: 17,854

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms
Language: Python
Category: Claude Stars: 56,064 | Forks: 5,457

item.title: [Claude] gstack
item.description:
📉 Rank: #8 → #9 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 58,259 → 59,877 (+1,618)
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 59,877 | Forks: 7,870

item.title: [Claude] lobehub
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1)
The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 74,577 | Forks: 14,836

item.title: [Claude] NextChat
item.description:
📉 Rank: #5 → #6 (↓1)
✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android | Linux | Windows
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 87,603 | Forks: 59,960

item.title: [Claude] everything-claude-code

item.title: [Claude] claude-code
item.description:
📈 Rank: #6 → #5 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 84,750 → 94,017 (+9,267)
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
Language: Shell
Category: Claude Stars: 94,017 | Forks: 13,279

item.title: [Claude] claw-code
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #7 in Claude
The fastest repo in history to surpass 50K stars ⭐, reaching the milestone in just 2 hours after publication. Better Harness Tools, not merely storing the archive of leaked Claude Code but make real things done. Now rewriting in Rust using oh-my-codex.
Language: Rust
Category: Claude Stars: 80,280 | Forks: 78,902

item.title: [Chatbot] chatbot-ui
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #10 in Chatbot
AI chat for any model.
Language: TypeScript
Category: Chatbot Stars: 33,137 | Forks: 9,436

item.title: [AI Agents] ragflow
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs
Language: Python
Category: AI Agents Stars: 76,755 | Forks: 8,603

item.title: [AI] openclaw
